name: dotclaude
description: AI dev infrastructure framework — /dotclaude:bootstrap authors CLAUDE.md + docs/ + .claude/ tuned to your project. Per-domain entries: design (showpiece), coding, planning, testing, data, ai-workflow.

plugins.name: dotclaude
plugins.description: AI dev infrastructure framework for any Claude Code project. /dotclaude:bootstrap walks 7 layers — project identity → architecture → process → quality bar → knowledge graph → domain kits → maintenance — and authors CLAUDE.md + docs/ + .claude/ derived from your project. Per-domain entries: /dotclaude:design (UX/IA/a11y showpiece), /dotclaude:coding, /dotclaude:planning, /dotclaude:testing, /dotclaude:data, /dotclaude:ai-workflow. /dotclaude:init is the v1 entry (Layer 6 only) for incremental adoption.
